description: Dispatcher inspects a ready queue of size 1 and must emit autonomy.queue.available plus autonomy.queue.thin. It must not emit autonomy.queue.empty or autonomy.inbox.available. Proves the emit-only predicate plumbing (run-emits-event / run-omits-event) against a real dispatcher run.

provenance.justification: Proves the fixture → workflow → run-emits-event / run-omits-event predicate plumbing works end-to-end for emit-only autonomy workflows. Orthogonal to per-workflow regression coverage: all 987 dispatcher runs in .kota/runs/ are success on this branch, so there is no real-failure history to encode yet. This fixture exists to fail loudly when the emitted-events.jsonl logging, the predicate kinds themselves, or dispatcher's queue-shape event emission regress; a real-failure dispatcher fixture should replace it once the first bad dispatcher run lands.
